warnings: This upper-floor sheet carries ALL of this house's air-conditioning (3 wall-type units: 2x12,000 BTU + 1x24,000 BTU) -- the ground floor (M-01, page 62) has none, since all 3 bedrooms are upstairs.

IMPORTANT: the 24,000 BTU unit in นอน 1 exceeds the largest BTU tier (18,000) covered by the AC circuit-sizing table on EE-06 (page 61) -- no breaker/wire spec is printed anywhere in this drawing set for a unit this size. Same gap flagged on the EE-06 ac_notes sibling file; carried here too since this is the sheet that actually specifies the 24,000 BTU unit's existence.

GRID: a house-wide grid master (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json) appeared partway through this extraction batch; grid columns/rows read from the same printed dimension chain as the other EE/M sheets for this house match the master exactly.

The 6th/last ceiling-fan+grille pair (80 CFM / 6x6, near ระเบียง) is positioned at the edge of the plan near the กันสาด (canopy) label and could belong functionally to either นอน 1 or a small ancillary space off the balcony -- room attribution is a best-effort proximity read, not an explicit per-unit label.

This is the second of 2 mechanical sheets in the drawing set (M-02 of 2) -- together with M-01 (page 62) it covers this 2-story house's full AC/ventilation layout, split by floor the same way the electrical lighting/outlet plans are split (EE-03/04, EE-05/06).
